label: Foundational
description: Initial sovereignty controls in place. Significant gaps remain in jurisdictional independence and operational resilience.

label: Developing
description: Core sovereignty controls are operational. Data localisation and access controls meet baseline requirements.

label: Advanced
description: Comprehensive sovereignty controls active. Auditability, key management, and operational independence are demonstrably achieved.

label: Pioneering
description: Full sovereignty posture. All critical controls met, with evidence of tested continuity and minimal external dependencies.
